shared.description: The threads of this cowl were pulled from the molten core of a volcano!
shared.notes:
• I-IV versions previously appeared in the retired quest  Master of Puppets and were previously named 'Magma Cowl', 'Glowing Magma Cowl', 'Smoldering Magma Cowl', and 'Molten Magma Cowl' respectively.
• The following changes were implemented on  May 15th, 2026:
• Helms were tiered as Roman numerals and prefixes were removed.
• Block and Parry Defense stats were either added (III) or raised to match the Dodge Defense stat (+1 to +3 on IV).
• V tier of these helms were added.

name: Restored Experimental Visage
description: This hollowed out 'phage head oddly seems to fit you quite comfortably. And the holographic display works too! This item requires a Dragon Amulet.
notes:
• Helm was released on August 21st, 2021 alongside the 50% War Meter, but was physically unobtainable until the release of  Revolution on August 30th, 2021.
• Previously had the description: This hollowed out 'phage head oddly seems to fit you quite comfortably. And the holographic display works too! This item requires a Dragon Amulet to use. (Broken Experimental Visage will drop from a future quest).
• Helm is animated; data scrolls upwards through the visage.

shared.description: Under the visor of this helm glow strange glyphs the likes of which you've never seen before. (Cosmetic)
shared.notes:
• Helms are animated; data scrolls horizontally through the helm, and part of the soul piece spirals continuously in its Poison elemental attunement appearance.
• Helms' soul piece shape is attuned to the player's equipped weapon's element; refer to   for all appearances.
• Helm is color-custom; the soul piece, data scrolls, and helm's circuitry components are linked to the player's dragon eye color.

shared.description: These portable containment units draw upon their wearer's mana to produce a protective bubble. While hastily prepared with limited resources, Ostromir and Vseslava assure you it is perfectly serviceable. (Cosmetic)
shared.notes:
• Any version of these helms must be equipped or shown to begin the following quests:  Roots of Change,  The Way Forward,  Through the Tangle,  The Deep Dark,  Into the Abyss,  Fate's Flow (Part 1), and  Fate's Flow (Part 2).
• Helms are animated; blue-to-pink gradient rotates within the helm continuously.
• Helms overlay the player's chosen hairstyle.
• A cosmetic Self-Containment Unit v15.05 equippable by all players was released on  December 30th, 2022.

shared.description: Click on this helm to activate the SnuggleBear armor! This is the helm and armor worn by warriors of love everywhere. Happy Hero's Heart Day!
shared.notes:
• SnuggleBear Helm (B) and SnuggleBear Helm (P) were previously stylized as 'Snugglebear Helm (B)' and 'Snugglebear Helm (P)' respectively; this was changed on February 17th, 2026.
SnuggleBear Helm (B)
SnuggleBear Helm (P)
• Helm had a low drop rate from the quest Crystal Clear Lake and select Hero's Heart Day quests.
• Helm had different appearances depending on the player's gender.
• Clicking the helm equipped the  SnuggleBear class.
• Helm was previously available from the quest  Burn It All! and the retired quest  Crystal Clear Lake.
• The following changes were implemented on  February 13th, 2026:
• Helm was retired and replaced by  SnuggleBear Armor.
• Male and female appearances for this helm were transposed to  SnuggleBear Helm (B) and  SnuggleBear Helm (P) respectively.

shared.description: You've infused your helm with shadow energy. The power that it held has been increased, but you now seem to see odd shapes at the edge of your vision. This item requires a Dragon Amulet.
shared.notes:
• II-IV versions previously required 1  DeathKnight Helm & 2/3/4  Umbral Essence respectively.
• Helms were tiered with Roman numerals on  August 25th, 2023; Required Items on II-IV versions were also changed on that date.
